{"headers":["title","description","content","url","publishedAt","quality"],"rows":[["How high will Bitcoin get in 2026? | Prediction Markets | Coinbase","Make your prediction on How high will Bitcoin get in 2026?. Trade on the future with Coinbase Predictions.","The Coinbase prediction market asks: Will Bitcoin's spot price, as measured by the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index (BRTI), exceed $99,999.99 at any point between January 2, 2026, 6:00 PM ET and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET? If so, the market resolves to Yes; otherwise, it resolves to No. The resolution uses a trimmed mean of BRTI values, discarding the top and bottom 20% of minute-by-minute prices during the period and averaging the remaining 60%. If the threshold is crossed at any time, the market resolves early. If no data is available at expiration, the market resolves to No. The outcome is verified by CF Benchmarks.

As of now, the market gives a 23% probability that Bitcoin will exceed $99,999.99 in 2026 ("Yes" contracts at 23¢, "No" at 78¢). For higher thresholds, the probabilities are 14% for above $109,999.99 and 11% for above $119,999.99. The market expires January 1, 2027 (213 days from now), with $1,804,719.70 in open interest, $47,998.29 in 24-hour volume (up 287.10%), and $6.9M total volume.

Trading is open to Coinbase Financial Markets (CFM) users who complete onboarding. Employees of source agencies and those with material non-public information are prohibited from trading. Contracts pay $1 if the event occurs, $0 if not; profit equals payout minus purchase price and fees. Settlement usually occurs within 24 hours of market close, with projected payout 60 minutes after closing. Trading is available 24/7 except for a weekly maintenance window. Fees apply and are disclosed before order placement.","https://www.coinbase.com/predictions/event/KXBTCMAXY-26DEC31","31 December 2026 12:00 AM UTC+0","6.0"],["ARMA Act (Bitcoin reserve bill) is suddenly trending
Here's  | KuCoin","ARMA Act (Bitcoin reserve bill) is suddenly trending
Here's why:
The full text of the American Reserve Modernization Act (ARMA) just became public and for the f","ARMA Act (Bitcoin reserve bill) is suddenly trending Here's why: The full text of the American Reserve Modernization Act (ARMA) just became public and for the first time, lawmakers are proposing a framework that would treat $BTC as a permanent strategic asset of the United States. Key points: - Creates a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve - Creates a separate Digital Asset Stockpile for non-BTC assets - Moves government-owned BTC into long-term custody - Requires quarterly Proof-of-Reserves audits - Locks Bitcoin holdings for 20 years before major sales are allowed The biggest surprise? Unlike the original Bitcoin Act, there is no requirement to buy 1 million BTC. The market is starting to realize Bitcoin isn't being treated like a tech stock anymore. It's being treated like a reserve asset.

Disclaimer: The information on this page may have been obtained from third parties and does not necessarily reflect the views or opinions of KuCoin. This content is provided for general informational purposes only, without any representation or warranty of any kind, nor shall it be construed as financial or investment advice. Please carefully evaluate the risks of a product and your risk tolerance based on your own financial circumstances. For more information, please refer to our  and .","https://www.kucoin.com/news/insight/BTC/6a2749377fa88d00071d1df0","6 August 2026 12:00 AM UTC+0","8.0"],["Подвійні інвестиції: висока прибутковість, помірний ризик Bitunix","Отримуйте більше з подвійною інвестицією Bitunix. Вкладайте BTC, ETH або USDT із фіксованою прибутковістю до 399% річних. Без комісій, без прослизання, гарантовані розрахунки.","Bitunix пропонує продукт «Подвійні інвестиції» для торгівлі криптовалютами з високою прибутковістю (до 233.01% APR) і помірним ризиком, без торгових комісій і проскальзування. Користувачі можуть обирати пари, наприклад BTC/USDT, ETH/BTC, USDT/BTC, і встановлювати цільову ціну продажу або купівлі. Якщо після закінчення терміну дії (наприклад, 10 днів, 2026-06-12) ціна базової монети (наприклад, BTC) перевищує цільову, BTC продається за цільовою ціною, а інвестор отримує USDT і відсотки; якщо ціна нижча, інвестор зберігає BTC і отримує відсотки в BTC. Для стратегії «купити дешево» інвестор вкладає USDT, і якщо ціна на дату розрахунку нижча або дорівнює цільовій, USDT автоматично конвертується в BTC за цільовою ціною з відсотками в BTC; якщо ціна вища — інвестор зберігає USDT і отримує відсотки в USDT. Приклади ставок APR для BTC-USDT на 10 днів (2026-06-12): цільова ціна 72,000 — 45.37% APR, 73,000 — 31.88%, 74,000 — 22.07%, 75,000 — 13.49%, 76,000 — 9.56%, 77,000 — 5.88%. Розрахунок відбувається о 08:00 (UTC) на дату закінчення, кошти зараховуються до 10:00 (UTC). Прибуток розраховується як APR × термін / 365. Продукт підходить для трейдерів і ходлерів, які хочуть отримати додатковий дохід, реалізувати прибуток або купити криптовалюту на просадці. Всі умови, визначення і приклади розрахунків наведені у FAQ на сайті Bitunix.","https://www.bitunix.com/uk-ua/earn/dual-investment/market/BTC/BTC-USDT/sell-high/2026-06-12/1","12 June 2026 12:00 AM UTC+0","6.0"],["Botanix Will Shut Down Bitcoin Layer-2 Network in July, Citing Lack of DeFi Demand - Decrypt","Botanix asked users to withdraw funds, disclosing plans to wind down its Bitcoin-based layer-2 network in July.","Botanix announced plans to wind down its Bitcoin-based layer-2 network less than a year after launch, asking users to withdraw funds before July 9, after which assets will become unrecoverable. The project cited failure to achieve significant product market fit and lackluster fee generation as reasons for closure. Botanix Labs had raised $8.5 million in 2024 from investors including Bitcoin influencers Dan Held and Eric Wall. Botanix, designed as an “EVM-equivalent” network, aimed to let developers port Ethereum applications to Bitcoin with minimal changes and emphasized self-custody through a federation of independent node operators. Despite plans for a native token, Botanix never launched one due to insufficient traction. The team noted that most users still view Bitcoin as a reserve asset, preferring to use it on Ethereum layer-2 networks for lower costs and ease of use, even if those solutions are more centralized. Botanix stated, “We were, and still are, believers in decentralization,” but acknowledged that current on-chain growth favors distribution over new base-layer infrastructure. User behavior skewed toward generating yield rather than frequent transactions, resulting in a user base that cost more to serve than it generated in fees. As of Wednesday, assets locked in Botanix smart contracts had fallen to $120,000 from a $26.3 million peak in September, with only $10 in fees generated in the past day. Botanix shared a detailed postmortem on X, expressing regret and transparency about the decision, calling it “the hardest one we have made in four years.”","https://decrypt.co/370671/botanix-shut-down-bitcoin-layer-2-network-lack-defi-demand","10 June 2026 06:11 PM UTC+0","7.0"],["SpaceX's $75 Billion IPO Looms Over Bitcoin— Is A Liquidity Drain Coming? | Bitcoinist.com","Bitcoin (BTC) and the wider cryptocurrency market could face additional selling pressure this week as Elon Musk’s SpaceX gears up for its IPO.","SpaceX is preparing for a $75 billion IPO, with up to 30% ($22.5 billion) of shares reserved for retail investors, which analysts warn could drain liquidity from Bitcoin (BTC) and the broader cryptocurrency market. The event is expected to prompt investors to rotate funds from higher-risk assets like Bitcoin into the IPO, as both markets compete for speculative capital. Spencer Hallarn, global head of over-the-counter trading at GSR, stated, “Crypto is a funding currency for a lot of this,” emphasizing that the IPO’s capital must come from somewhere, likely impacting crypto prices. Thomas Puech, CEO of INDIGO, noted that investor focus has shifted toward AI-related opportunities, which are currently seen as more attractive than crypto. David Morrison, senior market analyst at Trade Nation, commented that “Bitcoin has lost its luster and novelty for many investors,” exacerbating the potential outflow. Sui Chung, CEO of CF Benchmarks, reported that crypto ETF outflows exceeded $2 billion in May, with much of this capital moving into equities, though not necessarily directly into SpaceX. Bitcoin is currently trading around $62,136, about 50% below its all-time high of $126,000 (CoinGecko). With more high-profile IPOs expected and cautious market sentiment, analysts suggest crypto may struggle to recover quickly. Hallarn added that the current environment does not look supportive for a strong crypto rebound. The article also references related crypto news and maintains a formal, analytical tone throughout.","https://bitcoinist.com/spacexs-75-billion-ipo-looms-over-bitcoin/","10 June 2026 06:10 PM UTC+0","7.0"]]}
